note: The FBI takes reported crime data and adjusts it for gaps and underreporting to provide consistent long-term estimates over time. That means it may be different to reported crime figures.
title: Estimated property crime rate in the United States
subtitle: Estimated [property crime](#dod:property-crime) rate per 100,000 people. Property crime includes the offenses of burglary, larceny, motor vehicle theft, and arson.
